steps.title: Complete the subject
steps.content: The blank must complete the subject before the verb is. The phrase needs to identify which wildlife biologist is on the front lines of conservation.

steps.title: Join the title and name
steps.content: Choice A treats the name as removable extra information, and Choice D opens that same comma structure without closing it. Choice B places a colon inside the subject phrase, which breaks the sentence. A professional title directly before an identifying name needs no punctuation. The answer is C.
